articles.title: Vietnam AI law takes effect, first in South-east Asia
articles.description: It is the first country in South-east Asia with a comprehensive framework on the booming technology. Read more at straitstimes.com.
articles.content:
HANOI - A law regulating artificial intelligence (AI) went into effect in Vietnam on March 1, making it the first country in South-east Asia with a comprehensive framework on the booming technology.
Passed by the National Assembly in December, the la... [2996 chars]

articles.title: GACTC weighs options for facility expansion
articles.description: After an anticipated facility and feasibility presentation, the Greater Altoona Career and Technology Center is weighing additional expansion options to accommodate more than 1,000 students, according to Executive Director Nicole Zernick. The $7,500 presentation – awarded to Crabtree, Rohrbaugh and Associates in February 2025 – addressed concerns such as building maintenance issues and high student […]
articles.content:
After an anticipated facility and feasibility presentation, the Greater Altoona Career and Technology Center is weighing additional expansion options to accommodate more than 1,000 students, according to Executive Director Nicole Zernick.
The $7,500 ... [1919 chars]

articles.title: The AI hardware crisis is a goldmine for this small-cap tech stock
articles.description: Every few years, corporations replace thousands of laptops as part of routine technology upgrades. Many of these machines still work perfectly well. They simply fall out of the corporate replacement cycle. Until recently, this created waste. Today, it is creating opportunity. Rising semiconductor costs and increasing demand for computing power are pushing up prices of new devices. As a result, refurbished computers are beginning to look like a rational alternative rather than a compromise.
articles.content: Welcome to the latest edition of Hidden Gems Weekly. In recent weeks we examined a small-cap automating India’s railway future, a QSR stock that just hit 570 stores and a debt-free gem front-running the data centre cycle spending and consumer expansi... [11063 chars]

articles.title: Nomad merges with security technology company
articles.description: Nomad, which began in 2002 in the Flathead Valley, has merged with Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc., which is headquartered in San Diego, California.
articles.content:
Nomad Global Communication Solutions, Inc. has merged with a technology company that focuses on manufacturing in weapons and military electronics.
Nomad, which began in 2002 in the Flathead Valley, has merged with Kratos Defense & Security Solutions,... [1842 chars]

articles.title: US Domestic News Briefs: Legal Battles and High-Stakes Diplomacy
articles.description: Recent US domestic news covers legal actions against FedEx for emergency tariffs, the US DOJ's charges over an anti-ICE protest in Minnesota, a lawsuit challenging Kansas' new transgender law, CIA's assessments on Iran's leadership, Radiohead's demand from ICE, and Trump's AI technology directive involving Anthropic.
articles.content:
FedEx faces legal challenges in Miami as customers seek refunds following the U.S. Supreme Court's ruling against emergency tariffs imposed by the Trump administration on imported goods.
The U.S. Justice Department has charged 30 more individuals in ... [331 chars]

articles.title: Dr Jitendra addresses Thiruvananthapuram meet, traces India's journey from civilisational resilience to technology leadership
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent THIRUVANANTHAPURAM, Feb 28 : Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Earth Sciences, PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances, Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space, Dr. Jitendra Singh traced India’s journey from civilisational resilience to technology leadership and said that India’s journey from being counted among the “Fragile Five” economies in 2014 to emerging as the world’s fourth largest economy reflects a decisive shift in national confidence, capability, and direction. He said India is now firmly on course […]
articles.content:
Excelsior Correspondent
THIRUVANANTHAPURAM, Feb 28 : Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Earth Sciences, PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances, Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space, Dr. Jitendra Singh traced India’s journe... [3185 chars]

articles.title: EAM Jaishankar chairs first consultative meeting on India
articles.description: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar said he held the first 2026 Consultative Committee meeting on India-EU relations, highlighting the strong partnership between India and the EU in areas such as trade, technology, security, and mobility.
articles.content: New Delhi [India], March 1 (ANI): External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar chaired the first 2026 Consultative Committee meeting on India-EU relations, highlighting the strong partnership between India and the EU in areas such as trade, technology, sec... [1959 chars]

articles.title: OpenAI details layered protections in US defense department pact
articles.description: Feb 28 (Reuters) - OpenAI said on ⁠Saturday that the agreement it struck a day ago with the Pentagon ⁠to deploy technology on the U.S. defense department's classified network includes additional ‌safeguards to protect its use cases.
articles.content:
Feb 28 (Reuters) - OpenAI said on ⁠Saturday that the agreement it struck a day ago with the Pentagon ⁠to deploy technology on the U.S. defense department's classified network includes additional ‌safeguards to protect its use cases.
U.S. President Do... [1912 chars]

articles.title: OpenAI Secures Groundbreaking Pentagon Deal with Unprecedented Safeguards
articles.description: OpenAI has agreed to a pivotal deal with the Pentagon, incorporating stringent safeguards to protect classified AI technology. This comes amid tensions with Anthropic, which faces supply-chain risk designation. OpenAI ensures its technology cannot be used for surveillance, autonomous weapons, or critical automated decisions.
articles.content: OpenAI revealed that it has struck a significant agreement with the Pentagon to deploy technology within the U.S. defense department's classified network, introducing advanced safeguards to protect its use. This move follows U.S. President Donald Tru... [804 chars]

articles.title: From ‘Kerala’ to ‘Keralam’ reflects Modi Govt’s commitment: Dr Jitendra
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent THIRUVANANTHAPURAM, Feb 28 : Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Earth Sciences, and MoS PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances, Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space, Dr Jitendra Singh addressed a programme organised by the Institute of Engineers along with several NGOs under the leadership of former Union Minister A. Muralidharan. The programme deliberated on preparing a roadmap for Kerala’s development over the next decade up to 2036 and aligning it with the broader Vision Bharat goals. Dr […]
articles.content:
Excelsior Correspondent
THIRUVANANTHAPURAM, Feb 28 : Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Earth Sciences, and MoS PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances, Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space, Dr Jitendra Singh addressed a pr... [2309 chars]
